schema:description:
This small collection contains images of the UC Davis campus which were taken by individuals and later donated to the library.

 Ricardo Ortega, a photographer based in Venezuela, discovered a group of fifteen unidentified Kodachrome slides from September 1975. He digitized the slides and with the help of [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/forgottenfilm/comments/sg8tk7/aerial_shoots_from_found_slides_does_anyone_know/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web2x&context=3) he was able to determine that the images were of the UC Davis campus. In 2022, he donated the digital files to the UC Davis Library.

The finding aid is at the [Online Archive of California](https://oac.cdlib.org/findaid/ark:/13030/c8ww7qkh/).
schema:name: Photographs of the University of California, Davis Campus
schema:publisher: UC Davis Library, Archives and Special Collections
